blended.narrative: Vail is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 28".
